M1210_HEARG_ABLTY M1210 Ability To Hear This field indicates the patient's ability to hear. 00 = Adequate: hears normal conversation without difficulty.
01 = Mildly to Moderately Impaired: difficulty hearing in some
environments or speaker any need to increase volume or speak distinctly.
02 = Severely Impaired: absence of useful hearing.
UK = Unable to assess hearing. CHAR 2 x x x x
M1220_UNDRSTG_VERBAL_CNTNT M1220
